channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Lahore police launch investigation after abduction and assault of two foreign women; suspects arrested
item.description: Lahore police have registered a case against five suspects in connection with the abduction and alleged sexual assault of two foreign women in the provincial capital. According to police officials, th...

item.title: Former security guard jailed after impersonating G4S staff to steal £117,200 from London bank
item.description: A former private security guard has been jailed after using his old uniform to impersonate a G4S custodian and trick bank staff into handing over £117,200 in cash during a calculated fraud at a Santan...

item.title: Minister clarifies no fabric approved for NYSC uniform replacement after Adire remarks
item.description: The Minister of Youth Development, Ayodele Olawande, has clarified and withdrawn his earlier statement suggesting that Adire fabric could be considered for replacing the National Youth Service Corps (...

item.title: Political scientist warns of alleged DOJ–Maduro negotiation tied to 2020 election interference claims
item.description: The article reports on comments made by political scientist Norman Ornstein regarding what he describes as a concerning and unfolding scenario involving the U.S. Department of Justice under the Trump ...

item.title: Conservative commentator criticizes pastor over comments on interracial family and birthright citizenship ruling
item.description: A conservative media figure, John Podhoretz, sparked controversy after sharply criticizing pastor Joel Webbon over remarks related to his interracial family and views on citizenship. The dispute began...

item.title: Tanzania and United States sign five-year health partnership to strengthen health systems and cooperation
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Tanzania and the United States have signed a five-year bilateral Global Health Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) aimed at strengthening health systems, expanding digital infrastructure...

item.title: IGP Disu holds strategic meeting with former Inspectors-General of Police in Abuja
item.description: The Inspector-General of Police (IGP), Olatunji Disu, on Thursday held a strategic meeting with former Inspectors-General of Police at the Force Headquarters in Abuja. The engagement was aimed at stre...

item.title: Vongani Mashile reflects on earning Comrades Green Number after completing 10 Comrades Marathons
item.description: The article focuses on seasoned long-distance runner Vongani Mashile, who is featured in episode two of Sowetan On The Move. Mashile reflects on his journey in the Comrades Marathon, one of South Afri...

item.title: Reign Parani shares fun facts and personal quirks in S.O.S.H Slambook feature
item.description: Reign Parani is featured in a lighthearted S.O.S.H Slambook segment where she opens up about her personality, interests, and unique quirks in a candid and creative manner. The piece highlights how she...

item.title: Rescue team frees survivor after eight days trapped in Venezuela earthquake rubble
item.description: A 43-year-old security guard has been rescued alive after spending eight days trapped beneath the rubble of a collapsed shopping centre basement in Catia La Mar, Venezuela, following devastating twin ...

item.title: Former Olympic athlete faces felony indictment over alleged damage to Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool amid debate on prosecution severity
item.description: A former three-time Olympic canoe slalom athlete, David Hearn, has been indicted on felony charges following an incident at the recently renovated Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool in Washington, D.C. ...

item.title: NHAI takes disciplinary action after cave-in on Delhi–Dehradun Expressway section
item.description: The National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) has initiated strict disciplinary action following a cave-in incident reported on a section of the Delhi–Dehradun Expressway. The incident came to light...

item.title: Investigation launched after youth organiser dies in Nairobi shooting linked to PS security detail
item.description: Authorities in Nairobi are investigating a fatal shooting incident that led to the death of youth mobiliser Cecil Otieno Ouma following a government youth empowerment forum held at Kariokor Social Hal...

item.title: Tanzania Buildings Agency opens 38 public-private partnership sites for nationwide property development
item.description: The Tanzania Buildings Agency (TBA) has launched a major initiative aimed at attracting private sector investment through Public-Private Partnerships (PPPs) by opening 38 government-owned land sites f...

item.title: Sardar Tanveer Ilyas joins IPP after leaving PPP amid ticket dispute in AJK politics
item.description: Former Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) Prime Minister Sardar Tanveer Ilyas has officially joined the Istehkam-e-Pakistan Party (IPP) after quitting the Pakistan Peoples Party (PPP) AJK chapter. According...

item.title: Fans file lawsuit against StubHub over cancelled World Cup ticket orders
item.description: A group of football fans has filed a proposed class-action lawsuit against StubHub in federal court in New York, alleging that the ticket resale platform failed to deliver valid tickets for FIFA World...

item.title: La Prairie expands White Caviar skincare line with new brightening science innovations
item.description: La Prairie has introduced a new development for its White Caviar skincare line, highlighting advancements in brightening science and skin luminosity. The announcement centres on the brand’s continued ...

item.title: Why the isiZulu translation of James Joyce’s Ulysses shows the global power of African languages
item.description: The article discusses the significance of translating parts of James Joyce’s classic novel Ulysses into isiZulu, one of South Africa’s major African languages. The focus is on South African writer and...

item.title: Ottawa and British Columbia reach major resource agreement that maintains North Coast oil tanker ban
item.description: The federal government and British Columbia have announced a multibillion-dollar memorandum of understanding aimed at advancing major resource projects and economic development while maintaining key e...

item.title: India and Japan expand strategic partnership with focus on defence, AI, energy security and economic roadmap
item.description: India and Japan have significantly strengthened their strategic partnership during the 16th annual summit held in New Delhi, where Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaic...
